2026-03-23.name: MON
2026-03-23.movements:
8 Toes-to-bars
10 Single-DB Hang Clean & Jerks (35/50 lb)
12/14-cal Row
subPerform 5 clean and jerks with one arm, then switch.

2026-03-24.name: TUE
2026-03-24.movements:
50/60-cal Bike
Double-DB Walking Lunges 150ft (35/50 lb)
20 Wall Walks
subSplit work as needed; 1 partner works at a time.
sub2 rounds for time with a partner

2026-03-26.name: THU
2026-03-26.movements:
Every 5:00 for 25:00:
400m Run
15 Overhead Squats (65/95 lb)
subRest the remainder of the 5:00
